overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit bar interior with teal and orange lighting, then exiting into a dystopian industrial street at night. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics including holographic advertisements, elevated highways, and domed industrial structures.

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter facing the camera
patron sitting on a bar stool facing the counter

row of chrome beer dispensers with black handles

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit cyberpunk bar with teal and cyan lighting. The camera moves along a curved bar counter featuring chrome beer taps and white stools. A bartender stands behind the counter while a patron sits on the left, and backlit shelves of bottles line the back wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: bar lounge area with seating and holographic advertisements

events.description: approaching the glass exit door leading to the street outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area toward the exit, passing a seated patron on a blue sofa

notable_agents.action: patron sitting on blue sofa holding a drink
patron walking toward the bar counter

entered.detail: light blue upholstered bench seating in a spotlight
large vertical poster with 'FIXER' text and character artwork
rotating cylindrical hologram display with '15 MINUTES' text
small table with bottles and glasses in front of the sofa
glass door with metal frame leading to the street

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the bar, the scene transitions to a lounge area with a blue sofa illuminated by a warm spotlight. A holographic advertisement rotates above while a 'FIXER' poster decorates the wall. The camera approaches the glass exit door, passing a patron relaxing on the sofa and another walking toward the bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban street with elevated highways and domed buildings

events.description: exits the bar into the night street with industrial architecture and neon lighting
vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street with headlights illuminating the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past industrial structures and illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving down the street
pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure with red warning lights along the edge
pair of large cylindrical industrial buildings with warm interior lighting
illuminated advertisement display with green holographic face
tall pole-mounted lights casting orange glow on the pavement
scattered garbage bags and cardboard boxes on the sidewalk
multi-level highway structure with cyan neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Stepping out of the bar, the scene opens into a wide industrial street at night under an overcast sky. Massive elevated highways with red warning lights dominate the background, while cylindrical domed buildings glow with warm light. The camera walks along a littered concrete sidewalk past neon billboards and streetlights, with occasional cars passing on the road and pedestrians walking by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a cyberpunk bar out into a sprawling, dystopian industrial street at night. It begins by gliding along a curved bar counter under teal and cyan lighting, passing chrome beer taps and backlit shelves of bottles. As the camera moves deeper into the venue, the scene shifts toward a lounge area where a warm spotlight illuminates a blue sofa and a rotating holographic advertisement. The perspective then pushes through a glass exit door, transitioning from the enclosed atmosphere of the bar to the wide expanse of a concrete sidewalk under an overcast sky. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a massive urban landscape dominated by elevated highways with red warning lights and glowing cylindrical domed buildings.
